The '''Kaer Orbital Platform''' was a two-kilometer-wide [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] base, built in orbit around a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Siskeen system/Legends|Siskeen system]].

==History==
It was constructed by the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] using materials specially ferried by Banking Clan Cargo Ships, and used as a refueling and repair station for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] at the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="CC" />

Shortly after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]] was assigned to the platform to rebuild the shattered [[Droid/Legends|droid]] armies of the Separatists. Clearing out the local population of [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]] that had found a refuge there, Sev'rance used the old facilities to construct many [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|dwarf spider droids]] and [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|homing spider droids]]. [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] General [[Jor Drakas]] eventually [[Battle of Kaer Orbital Platform|discovered]] the build-up, but Sev'rance was able to evacuate her new forces in time.

==Behind the scenes==
The Kaer Orbital Platform appeared in Separatist campaign of the [[2002]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''.<ref name="CC" /> The level was designed by [[Lily Mansfield]], who chose the name ''Kaer'' as a variation of the [[Wikipedia:Welsh language|Welsh]] word ''caer'', meaning fortress.<ref name="Interview">{{OfficialYouTube|channel=UCTTkrDBu5zBaqaJ1TiOziZQ|name=Wookieepedia|video=J1w3DCX2H7E|text=A Conversation with Lily Mansfield}}</ref>
